title: goodenia geniculata
intro: Goodenia geniculata, also known as Native Violet or Purple Goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving arthritis symptoms, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema. Goodenia geniculata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Aboriginal medicine.
